description:
- v3.4.41: Security hardening: 10MB upload limit, HTTP security headers (X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, CSP), secure_filename on deployed files and dev docs uploads, setup/skip post-setup guard.
- v3.4.42: Security hardening (C1/H1/M1/M2/M3) plus fix: package installer UI no longer hangs when an oversized file is uploaded — 413 and non-JSON responses now handled gracefully with a clear error message.
- v3.4.43: H2 security fix: session rotation on MFA completion — session.clear() called before login_user() in _complete_mfa_login() so pre-MFA session cookies cannot be replayed as authenticated sessions.
- v3.4.43: Session 38 closeout: updated ChatSummary_38, CurrentTask, and context doc. No code changes.
- v3.4.43: Session 39 closeout: security audit discussion, NBCP design brief, strategic direction decisions.
- v3.4.44: Security hardening: DB restore schema validation (C2), destructive SQL guard with auto-reset (C3), reset token replay block (H3b), config export credential warning (M4).
- v3.4.45: button.py rewritten to use lgpio for edge detection — fixes button on recent Pi OS kernel driver. RPi.GPIO edge detection broken on new gpiochip driver; lgpio works correctly as netwatch-svc.
- v3.4.47: Button long press → router reset (was modem). SystemSetup.txt updated: gpio group membership for netwatch-svc, lgpio venv gap (GAP-10).
- v3.4.48: Session 40 closeout: ChatSummary_40, hardware expanded summary, CurrentTask, context doc, SystemSetup updates.
- v3.4.49: CSP fix: add fonts.googleapis.com and fonts.gstatic.com to allowlist — Google Fonts blocked on admin page breaking Dev Docs download.
- v3.4.50: Fix gunicorn access logger crash on streaming file responses (status_code vs status). Fix CSP blocking Google Fonts on admin page.
- v3.4.52: Fix export_code_full hang: exclude .git from directory walk. Gunicorn timeout 30s->120s. Fix gunicorn access log crash on streaming responses. Fix CSP blocking Google Fonts.
- v3.4.53: Fix export_code_full hang on lgpio pipe file (.lgd-nfy0): add os.path.isfile() check to skip non-regular files. Also: .git exclusion, gunicorn timeout 120s, CSP Google Fonts, gunicorn access log fix.
- v3.4.54: Fix export_code_full timeout: switch from BytesIO to temp file so Flask can use efficient file streaming instead of buffering 2MB through TLS stack. Also: .git exclusion, isfile() check, gunicorn timeout 120s, CSP Google Fonts, gunicorn access log fix.
- v3.4.55: Session 40 true closeout: updated Gotchas (3 new entries), CurrentTask, context doc reflecting all post-closeout fixes v3.4.49-v3.4.54.
